FreeAgent:

WWDC starts tomorrow

Posted on 11 June 2007 by Johannes Fahrenkrug. Tags: WWDC
I used today to get some shopping done at the Valley Fair mall in Santa Clara. It's a very nice mall and I found a couple of nice things. I had to go to the Apple Store to check out the new MacBook Pros and the AppleTV, of course. Both are very nice, esp. the AppleTV because you can hack it ;-). We had dinner at Gordon Biersch in downtown San jose (Livecam). Nice atmosphere, the food was good and the beer was surprisingly good. Well, I'll be taking the Caltrain to San Francisco tomorrow morning at 5:45 AM because I still have to pick up my WWDC badge and I want to get a (good) seat for the keynote. So I guess I better go to bed and get some rest because I have a jam packed week of learning ahead of me!

Comments

Please keep it clean, everybody. Comments with profanity will be deleted.
